task: context-aware user behavior prediction and recommendation
input: context-user and context-item interaction graphs (nodes are feature fields of users, items, and contexts)
output: predicted user behavior (e.g., rating or preference score)
backbone: context-aware graph neural network (CA-GNN) with attention mechanism
loss: not specified (likely regression loss for RMSE/MAE)
key_idea: model feature interactions by constructing separate context-user and context-item graphs and applying GNN with attention
